action.sure: Are you sure you want to confirm this action?

login.name: Ingame-name
login.forgot_password_description: If you've forgotten your password, you can reset it by using the /account command in-game.
login.tagline: Your Minecraft server, fully in your hands.
login.description: Manage players, console, files, worlds and settings from one clean dashboard. No SSH, no fiddling with config files.
login.welcome_subtitle: Sign in to your server dashboard.

master.tagline: All your Minecraft servers in one place.
master.description: Create Paper, Fabric, Vanilla or proxy servers from here. VoxelDash One downloads the server jar and a matching Java version, then starts it for you. No manual setup, no SSH.
master.setup_subtitle: This is the first run. Create the admin account for this instance.
master.welcome_subtitle: Sign in to manage your servers.

motd.title: Message of the Day
motd.subtitle: Design the message and icon shown in the multiplayer server list
motd.saved_description: Your message of the day has been applied.
motd.editor_hint: Type below. This is exactly how it appears in the server list.
motd.restart_description: This platform applies the MOTD on the next server start. Restart the server for the changes to appear.
motd.no_hex_hint: This platform does not render hex colors; they will be matched to the nearest classic color.
motd.selection_hint: Select text, then pick a color or style to apply it. With no selection, the next characters you type use the chosen style.

icon.title: Server icon
icon.description: A 64x64 image shown next to your MOTD. Larger images are scaled down automatically.
icon.updated_description: The new icon has been applied.
icon.removed_description: The custom icon has been deleted.
icon.error_description: The image could not be processed. Please try a different file.

resources.subtitle: {{count}} resources installed
resources.store_coming_soon_description: The resource store will allow you to browse and install resources directly from the dashboard. This feature is currently under development.
resources.no_resources_description: You don't have any {{type}} installed yet.
resources.enabled_success: Resource enabled successfully. Restart may be required.
resources.disabled_success: Resource disabled successfully. Restart may be required.
resources.delete_description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
resources.not_found_description: The requested resource could not be found.

config.title: Configuration
config.no_files_description: This resource doesn't have any editable configuration files.

store.no_results_description: Try adjusting your search query or filters.
store.install_description: Select a version to install. The resource will be downloaded and enabled automatically.
store.no_compatible_versions: No compatible versions found for your server.
store.install_success: Resource installed successfully. Restart may be required.
store.install_success_restart: Resource installed. Restart required to enable.
store.api_key_required_description: {{provider}} requires an API key to access its resources. Configure your API key to browse and install resources from this provider.
store.api_key_change_hint: Enter a new API key to replace the existing one.

users.title: User Management
users.subtitle: Manage users and their permissions
users.create_description: Create a new user account with access to the dashboard.
users.delete_description: Are you sure you want to delete the user "{{username}}"? This action cannot be undone.
users.edit_username_description: Change the username for this account.
users.admin_role_description: Admins have full access to all features and can manage users.
users.no_users_description: Create a user to get started.
users.no_users_permissions: Create users first to manage their permissions.

error.username_length: Username must be between 3 and 32 characters
error.password_length: Password must be at least 6 characters

users.edit_permissions_description: Set what this user can access and modify.
users.admin_note: Note: Administrators have full access to all features regardless of individual permission settings.

players.title: Players
players.subtitle: Manage online players, whitelist, and bans
players.no_online_description: Players will appear here when they join the server.
players.no_whitelisted_description: Add players to the whitelist to allow them to join.
players.kick_description: This will kick {{count}} player(s) from the server.
players.ban_description: This will permanently ban {{count}} player(s) from the server.
players.unban_description: This will unban {{count}} player(s) and allow them to join again.
players.deop_success: Player is no longer an operator
players.add_whitelist_description: Enter the username of the player to add to the whitelist.
players.remove_whitelist_description: This will remove {{count}} player(s) from the whitelist.

files.file_renamed: The file has been renamed successfully.
files.copy_description: Select a destination folder and optionally rename the item.
files.move_description: Select a destination folder and optionally rename the item.
files.name: Name
files.delete_description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the item.
files.no_results: No files found matching your search.

empty.title: This folder is empty
empty.description: Upload files or create a new folder to get started.

create_folder.title: Create new folder
create_folder.feedback: The folder has been created successfully.

worlds.title: Worlds
worlds.subtitle: Manage server worlds, weather, time, and difficulty
worlds.create_description: Create a new world with custom settings.
worlds.none_found_hint: Worlds will appear here when the server loads them.

form.name: World Name
form.name_hint: Only letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens allowed.
form.seed_hint: Enter a number or text for world generation.

delete.title: Delete World
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone and all world data will be permanently lost.

backup.title: Backups
backup.subtitle: Create and restore backups of your server
backup.name: Backup
backup.none_found_hint: Create a backup to get started
backup.description: What do you want to backup?
backup.restore_text: VoxelDash will restore this backup while runtime. Since Minecraft automatically saves the worlds every few seconds from memory, your world might get corrupted. To prevent this, you can stop the server without saving the world from memory. Any unsaved changes made to the server while runtime will be lost. This does not apply if you want to restore logs or other files that are not getting automatically saved by Minecraft.

delete.title: Delete backup
delete.text: Are you sure you want to delete this backup?

status.title: Server Status
status.description: Control the main SSH server status

schedules.title: Schedules
schedules.subtitle: Automate server tasks with scheduled actions
schedules.create_description: Set up a new automated schedule for your server.
schedules.none_found_hint: Create a schedule to automate server tasks
schedules.create_task_description: Add a new task to this schedule.

delete.title: Delete Schedule
delete.description: Are you sure you want to delete this schedule? All tasks will be removed.

form.name: Schedule Name
form.minute_hint: The schedule will run at this minute of every hour

properties.warning: Changing these settings can have a significant impact on your server. Please proceed with caution.
properties.updated_description: Restart your server to apply the changes.

gameplay.label: Gameplay
gameplay.description: Game modes, PvP, and gameplay mechanics

properties.enable-jmx-monitoring: Enable JMX monitoring for server metrics and performance data
properties.level-seed: Seed for world generation. Leave empty for random seed
properties.enable-command-block: Enables command blocks in the game
properties.gamemode: Default game mode for new players
properties.generator-settings: Custom world generation settings in JSON format
properties.enforce-secure-profile: Enforces secure profiles for player authentication
properties.level-name: The name of the world directory
properties.motd: Message of the day shown in the server list
properties.query.port: Port for GameSpy4 protocol server queries
properties.generate-structures: Generate villages, dungeons, and other structures in new worlds
properties.max-players: Maximum number of players allowed on the server
properties.online-mode: Requires player authentication with Minecraft account
properties.allow-flight: Allows players to use flight in survival mode
properties.view-distance: Number of chunks sent to players for rendering
properties.enable-rcon: Enables remote console access to the server
properties.ressource-pack: URL to a custom resource pack
properties.simulation-distance: Distance at which game mechanics are processed
properties.player-idle-timeout: Time in minutes before idle players are kicked (0 to disable)
properties.force-gamemode: Force players to join in the default gamemode
properties.hardcore: If true, players will be set to spectator mode if they die
properties.white-list: Enables a white list on the server
properties.spawn-npcs: Allows villagers and other NPCs to spawn
properties.use-native-transport: Use native transport optimization if available
properties.broadcast-console-to-ops: Broadcast console command output to all online operators
properties.pause-when-empty-seconds: Time in seconds before server saves and halts when no players are online
properties.broadcast-rcon-to-ops: Broadcast Remote Console (RCON) to all online operators
properties.allow-nether: Allows players to travel to the Nether
properties.max-chained-neighbor-updates: Maximum number of chunk updates that can be chained at once
properties.max-tick-time: Maximum single tick time in milliseconds
properties.initial-disabled-packs: List of resource packs that are disabled by default
properties.resource-pack-sha1: SHA-1 hash of the resource pack
properties.spawn-protection: Distance in blocks around the spawn point that non-ops are prevented from building
properties.resource-pack: URL to a custom resource pack
properties.require-resource-pack: Force players to use the resource pack
properties.resource-pack-prompt: Text sent to clients when they are prompted to download a resource pack
properties.server-ip: IP address for server to listen on
properties.hide-online-players: Hides the number of online players in the server list

gamerules.title: Game Rules
gamerules.subtitle: Tweak the rules of the game. Changes apply to the running server.
gamerules.none_found_hint: This server did not report any game rules. You can still change them through the console.

profiling.title: Profiling
profiling.subtitle: Find out where the tick goes and which plugins or mods cause lag.

empty.title: No profile yet
empty.description: Start a session to see which plugins and mods take the most server time.

unsupported.title: Profiling not available
unsupported.description: This server doesn't support profiling. Live metrics are shown above.

noSamples.title: No samples collected
noSamples.description: The session ended before any stack samples were taken. Try a longer duration.

tree.title: Where the time goes
tree.hint: Each row is a method; expand to drill in. Click a plugin above to highlight where it spends time.

delete.title: Delete "{{name}}"?
delete.description: This permanently removes the server and all of its files. This can't be undone.

empty.title: No servers yet
empty.can_create: Create your first server. VoxelDash One downloads the software and a matching Java runtime, then starts it for you.
empty.no_access: You don't have access to any servers yet. Ask an administrator to grant you access.

forwardings.title: Forwardings
forwardings.connect_description: Link a playit.gg account to give your servers public addresses without port forwarding. One-click forwarding then appears on every server.
forwardings.waiting_approval: Waiting for you to approve the link…

empty.title: No forwardings yet
empty.description: Open the Servers page and hit "Forward" on a server to give it a public playit.gg address.

remove.title: Remove forwarding?
remove.description_prefix: Players will no longer be able to reach this server through

updates.title: Updates
updates.release_channel_description: Choose which builds servers and the dashboard update to.
updates.auto_updates_description: When on, servers and the dashboard update themselves in the background.
updates.node_updating: Updating to {{version}}. The dashboard will restart…
updates.auto_on: Automatic updates are on. VoxelDash keeps your servers and dashboard up to date on the {{channel}} channel.
updates.latest_build: Your servers and the VoxelDash One dashboard are running the latest {{channel}} build.

master_users.title: Users
master_users.create_description: New users start with no access until you grant permissions.
master_users.permissions_description: Control what this user can do across the servers.
master_users.access_all_hint: Off lets you pick specific servers.

error.username_length: Username must be at least 3 characters
error.password_length: Password must be at least 4 characters

action.admin_full: The admin always has full access

delete.title: Delete {{username}}?
delete.description: This removes the user and their access. This can't be undone.

console.empty: No console output yet. Server logs will appear here.

root.offline_hint: Start it from the server list, then open it again.
root.booting_hint: Booting up. Give it a sec...
root.file_management_hint: File management is available. Start the server for console, players and worlds.

notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.
